GeneralDescription.SourceString: Stoic sage, adoptive father and ninjutsu master who adores his sons.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Stoic sage, adoptive father and ninjutsu master who adores his sons.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: A ninjutsu master even before the Mutagen changed him, Master Splinter raised the Turtles as his sons, and taught them the way of the ninja to protect themselves from the outside world.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: A ninjutsu master even before the Mutagen changed him, Master Splinter raised the Turtles as his sons, and taught them the way of the ninja to protect themselves from the outside world.
